javadoc_before:
/** * Expert: A sorted hit queue for fields that contain string values. * Hits are sorted into the queue by the values in the field and then by document number. * The internal cache contains integers - the strings are sorted and * then only their sequence number cached. * *

Created: Feb 2, 2004 9:26:33 AM * * @author Tim Jones (Nacimiento Software) * @since lucene 1.4 * @version $Id$ */
javadoc_after:
/** * Expert: A sorted hit queue for fields that contain string values. * Hits are sorted into the queue by the values in the field and then by document number. * Warning: The internal cache could be quite large, depending on the number of terms * in the field! All the terms are kept in memory, as well as a sorted array of * integers representing their relative position. * *

Created: Feb 2, 2004 9:26:33 AM * * @author Tim Jones (Nacimiento Software) * @since lucene 1.4 * @version $Id$ */
